name: LinerSync Field Workflow Logic
purpose: Keep field production moving while Mythos warns, routes, and helps fix missing or bad QC data.
golden_path: Capture roll inventory or active roll
Capture weld test with 3 samples before production seam
Capture seam/wedge weld after 2 panels are deployed
Capture air test after seam is welded
Capture destructive test with 5 samples when required
production_rule: Mythos must not block production. It warns, ranks, routes to the fix screen, and suggests cleanup. Exports stay available even when data is missing.

carry_forward_defaults.active_roll: carry forward until changed or roll ends
carry_forward_defaults.air_start_pressure_psi: default 40 PSI but editable per project/spec
carry_forward_defaults.air_hold_minutes: default 5 minutes but editable per project/spec
carry_forward_defaults.air_max_drop_psi: default 4 PSI but editable per project/spec
carry_forward_defaults.machine_number: carry forward from last seam/weld test until changed
carry_forward_defaults.gps: auto attach when permission and lock are available

header.label: Project Header
header.mythos_behavior: warn and route to header; do not block

roll.label: Roll Inventory
roll.mythos_behavior: warn if no roll inventory or no active roll

panel.label: Panel Placement
panel.mythos_behavior: warn for missing panel log, missing roll link, or duplicate panel number

seam.label: Seam / Wedge Weld
seam.sequence_rule: production seam can be created after 2 panels are deployed and weld test has been captured
seam.mythos_behavior: warn when production seams are missing seam/machine/welder traceability

weld_test.label: Weld Test
weld_test.sequence_rule: weld test happens before actual production welding
weld_test.mythos_behavior: warn if no weld test before production seam; fail warning if result failed

air_test.label: Air Test
air_test.sequence_rule: air test happens after seam is welded
air_test.mythos_behavior: warn for missing fields; flag fail if below active pressure rule or over active drop rule

destructive_test.label: Destructive Test
destructive_test.mythos_behavior: warn if no destructive tests have been logged; fail warning if result failed; route to dedicated DT capture page

repair.label: Repair / Vacuum
repair.mythos_behavior: warn for missing fields; flag failed repairs as top priority

drone_photo.label: Drone / Photo
drone_photo.mythos_behavior: warn if drone/photo layer is empty or has no GPS

priority_order: failed air, destructive, or repair records
missing active roll or roll inventory
missing weld test before production seam
missing seam/wedge weld after 2 panels and weld test
missing air tests after seam exists
missing daily records for selected date
field_ui_principles: large buttons for gloves and phone use
warnings should be tappable and route to fix
